entries.name: approvals-expire-overdue
entries.purpose: Every 5 minutes: sweep approval_instances past expires_at with status='pending'. Transition per template.on_timeout (expire / approve / escalate). Match to config('approvals.expiration.sweep_frequency_minutes').

entries.name: approvals-dispatch-reminders
entries.purpose: Hourly at :00: check every pending approval_requirement against its template's reminder_config.intervals_hours + dispatch missing reminders. De-duplicates via approval_reminders composite unique.

entries.name: approvals-reconcile-template-versions
entries.purpose: Daily 02:30 UTC: enforce defensive invariants — one-is-active constraint, template-version cap, delegation-drift on pending requirements, orphan-instance detection. Dispatches supplementary reminders for delegation-drifted requirements.

entries.name: approvals-purge-expired
entries.purpose: Daily 03:00 UTC: hard-delete instances past retention (90-day for rejected/expired/cancelled; 7-year for executed). Cascades requirements + decisions + reminders.

entries.name: approvals-compliance-metrics-snapshot
entries.purpose: Daily 04:10 UTC: generate a compact daily metrics snapshot as JSON. Consumed by the compliance dashboards + monthly-aggregated into the tenant's SOC 2 evidence roll-up.
